calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-19-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of Two Minors.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lori Cheshire.
Petitioner: Maria A. Torreano, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minors: Audrey Maria Meyer and Nicole Anabelle Meyer, was sworn and examined.
Objection to the proposed change of names were made in open court by Michael Meyer.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of Minors to: Audrey Maria Torreano-Meyer and Nicole Anabelle Torreano-Meyer.
Decree signed in open court.
